'''gohakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:imagenologic|imagenologic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imagenologic|imagenologic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gohakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gohakithi|gohakithi]] || [[word:gohakiji|gohakiji]] || [[word:gohakishi|gohakishi]] || [[word:gohakiki|gohakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gohakuthuthu|gohakuthuthu]] || [[word:gohakujuju|gohakujuju]] || [[word:gohakushushu|gohakushushu]] || [[word:gohakukuku|gohakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gohakuthu|gohakuthu]] || [[word:gohakuju|gohakuju]] || [[word:gohakushu|gohakushu]] || [[word:gohakuku|gohakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gohakufthuf|gohakufthuf]] || [[word:gohakufjuf|gohakufjuf]] || [[word:gohakufshuf|gohakufshuf]] || [[word:gohakufkuf|gohakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gohakethe|gohakethe]] || [[word:gohakeje|gohakeje]] || [[word:gohakeshe|gohakeshe]] || [[word:gohakeke|gohakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gohakothotho|gohakothotho]] || [[word:gohakojojo|gohakojojo]] || [[word:gohakoshosho|gohakoshosho]] || [[word:gohakokoko|gohakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gohakotho|gohakotho]] || [[word:gohakojo|gohakojo]] || [[word:gohakosho|gohakosho]] || [[word:gohakoko|gohakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gohakofthof|gohakofthof]] || [[word:gohakofjof|gohakofjof]] || [[word:gohakofshof|gohakofshof]] || [[word:gohakofkof|gohakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfthÃŸf|gohakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfjÃŸf|gohakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfshÃŸf|gohakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfkÃŸf|gohakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|gohakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|gohakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|gohakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|gohakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfthÃŸf|gohakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfjÃŸf|gohakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfshÃŸf|gohakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfkÃŸf|gohakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfthÃŸf|gohakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfjÃŸf|gohakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfshÃŸf|gohakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gohakÃŸfkÃŸf|gohakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gohakÃḊthÃḊ|gohakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:gohakÃḊjÃḊ|gohakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:gohakÃḊshÃḊ|gohakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:gohakÃḊkÃḊ|gohakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gohakathatha|gohakathatha]] || [[word:gohakajaja|gohakajaja]] || [[word:gohakashasha|gohakashasha]] || [[word:gohakakaka|gohakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gohakatha|gohakatha]] || [[word:gohakaja|gohakaja]] || [[word:gohakasha|gohakasha]] || [[word:gohakaka|gohakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gohakafthaf|gohakafthaf]] || [[word:gohakafjaf|gohakafjaf]] || [[word:gohakafshaf|gohakafshaf]] || [[word:gohakafkaf|gohakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gohakasha|gohakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gohakshÃḋsha|gohakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohakrosha|gohakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohakmusha|gohakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohakyasha|gohakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogohaknkshÃḋsha|gogohaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogohaknkrosha|gogohaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogohaknkmusha|gogohaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogohaknkyasha|gogohaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gohahakasha|gohahakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gohahakshÃḋsha|gohahakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohahakrosha|gohahakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohahakmusha|gohahakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohahakyasha|gohahakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogohahaknkshÃḋsha|gogohahaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogohahaknkrosha|gogohahaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogohahaknkmusha|gogohahaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogohahaknkyasha|gogohahaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gehÃḊkasha|gehÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gehÃḊkshÃḋsha|gehÃḊkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gehÃḊkrosha|gehÃḊkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gehÃḊkmusha|gehÃḊkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gehÃḊkyasha|gehÃḊkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogehÃḊknkshÃḋsha|gogehÃḊknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogehÃḊknkrosha|gogehÃḊknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogehÃḊknkmusha|gogehÃḊknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogehÃḊknkyasha|gogehÃḊknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gohfakasha|gohfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gohfakshÃḋsha|gohfakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohfakrosha|gohfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohfakmusha|gohfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohfakyasha|gohfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogohfaknkshÃḋsha|gogohfaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogohfaknkrosha|gogohfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogohfaknkmusha|gogohfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogohfaknkyasha|gogohfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
